title: Monday Consultant
excerpt:
Hi there, we love using Monday and would like to hire a consultant/specialist to help us link our boards and process. 
Do you have a list of specialist consultants in Mexico City? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Rpmlv1 (Tod Wever)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you have an expert call me to help build out our board for property management? I started it but I’m having trouble getting it to do all the things I want it to do.

Seems like I should be able to easily track how many days on market (DOM) a vacant rental property sits. How do I do this?

Also, we currently send a weekly owner update to all our clients that gives them feedback on how many leads, showings, applications, we have had so far. Is there a way to build out the boards to automatically insert the data from those categories and send the owner updates automatically for me every week?

Is there a way to put my company logo on the emails and updates and remove the “powered by Monday.com” logo? I also want to remove Monday.com from subject this. How do I do this?

Can it alert me 60 days before the lease expires to contact the tenant regarding renewal?

How do integrate it with other apps? I need help setting this thing up.

My cell is 702-525-1777.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: @bradley can you answer him - think this is something we can just help him with

We are specialized in integrating monday.com platform with existing systems and creating automations using external tools.
Please contact me at roberto.tremonti@omnidea.it if you want to have a call.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Rpmlv1:

Hi Roberto,
I am interested to see if Monday.com can improve and automate parts of my business. Can we setup a call? My cell is 702-525-1777.

Hi Tod, due to recent COVID-19 restrictions, we have a hard time organizing a call with our developers. Could you please, in the meantime, share some details via email?

posts.author: Rpmlv1 (Tod Wever)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Roberto,
We manage rental property’s. We want to use this tool to organize all the activities and checklists surrounding getting a vacant property rented. Our management software (AppFolio) creates a Vacancy Report that we print off every week for our
team meeting and we talk about what needs to be done for each property but it is not effective.

We want our board to track the property address, homeowners email, homeowners phone, rental comps range, current asking rent (avg at the bottom), bedrooms, bathrooms, square feet (avg at the bottom), property notes, availability date, days vacant
(ie. days on market that counts automatically), next move-in date, priority (that automatically changes status based on days on market), marketing ad due date and status column, rent ready repairs due date and status column, I don’t know what the difference
is between using the “timeline” and due “date” feature but we want to use whatever is best, we want to keep track of all the tenant leads, showings, rental applications, approved applications, notes from showings and marketing recommendations for owner.

Every week we send homeowners a marketing update and we want to automate this process so the updates go the owners email automatically with our company logo that look professional. The updates would have unique messages saved in
monday.com for whatever week we are on AND it will auto populate certain data columns (ie. Leads, showings, applications, recommendations, etc.).

I heard that there are “forms” that can be built and placed on websites to enter a new pulse into the system with all the info we need filled out. We used DocuSign to sign up new clients so I’m curious if we can make the “form” apart of the contract
so when he is filling that out it will send the pulse to the system if they sign the contract.

This is the basic idea but would be open to any suggestions that you have on how real estate or property managers use the program. I see a lot of apps that configure with
monday.com but it feels overwhelming because I do not know what all of the apps do. My cell is 702-525-1777 if you could help me with this project asap.

Kind Regards,
Tod Wever

Principal/Broker, PRM®

DRE# 144020

Rentmax Property Management
P702.478.8800 | F702.441.0225 | C702.525.1777

8375
W FLAMINGO RD STE 100 LAS VEGAS, NV 89147

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday com is the most coveted Work OS among businesses of all sizes. Many Marketers, Project coordinators, Project managers, and Sales enablement specialists use this platform to delegate tasks with ease, keep track of due dates, improve collaboration, and drive workforce productivity.

If you are looking for a consultant/specialist who can help you link your boards and process with monday com, I would recommend you connect with a certified monday.com consulting partner . By partnering with certified experts, you can rest assured integration without disrupting the workflows.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return my email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bringing This Back – Proven Solutions for Rental & Short-Term Rental Workflows

I know this thread is a few years old, but the topic is still highly relevant for many businesses. We’ve built full-scale solutions for rental and short-term rental companies that cover everything from construction tracking to marketing, bookings, inspections, and rent management (including Xero integration).

Our workflows include:

  • Move-ins & Move-outs with automated reminders

  • Asset tracking (furnishings, square footage, bedrooms/bathrooms)

  • Marketing ad creation & posting

  • Application forms & requests

  • Rent follow-up & direct debit notifications

  • Team tasks and automated task management

We’re passionate about creating systems that deliver fluidity and efficiency, and we’re happy to share value upfront—whether that’s walking you through what we’ve built or brainstorming improvements for your setup.

If anyone is still exploring solutions like this, feel free to reach out: teameasy@easy-mondays.com.
Let’s make these workflows work for you!
